atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports routine follow-up for chronic medical conditions and concerns regarding fatigue and a testicular nodule.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports fatigue, primarily at the end of the day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty maintaining his previous cycling pace.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being previously able to ride 40 miles.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being limited to 20-30 miles.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes fatigue to age and general fatigue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a palpable nodule in his right testicle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient expresses concern regarding the testicular nodule.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient underwent an aortic valve replacement and ascending aortic aneurysm repair on 1/22/2013.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient was previously seen by Dr. Lewis for an echocardiogram in September 2019.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states his wife and friends have noted pursed lip breathing during exhalation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient completed his COVID-19 vaccinations.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's alkaline phosphatase level was elevated at 156.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His lipid panel showed a total cholesterol of 247.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His HDL was 66.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His LDL was 166.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His triglycerides were at 74.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His TSH was normal at 2.68.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His CBC was unremarkable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His vitamin D level was at the high end of normal at 94.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination revealed pursed lip breathing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A two to three millimeter palpable nodule was noted on the right testicle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The testicular nodule was without signs of hernia.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung fields appear normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's chronic medical conditions, including the aortic valve replacement and ascending aortic aneurysm repair, are stable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Elevated alkaline phosphatase suggests a possible bone-related etiology.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an echocardiogram

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a stress test

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an alkaline phosphatase

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a complete metabolic panel

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders pulmonary function testing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to urology

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects a right testicular nodule

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends a follow-up appointment with cardiology

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a return visit in approximately one year

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a return visit sooner if clinically indicated
